title: APEX Archive And Residue Routing Tranche
objective: Execute the bounded archive and residue routing tranche from the completed APEX-root decomposition plan by routing only the approved explicit archive holdings, non-import reference roots, heavy lineage assets, and residual coordination artifacts into governed archive homes while preserving provenance, avoiding runtime or authority surfaces, and recording empty obsolete roots without inventing new active homes for them.
active_role: APEX Archive And Residue Routing Operator
dependency_note: Packet 001 defined the tranche boundaries and packet 001e closed the clean spec-lineage pass. Packet 001f is the remaining bounded APEX-root routing tranche for explicit archive and residue surfaces only.
constrained_outputs: A bounded routing pass for the approved archive and residue roots only

Imported archive holdings under archive/legacy-repos/apex-platform/ with provenance-preserving subhomes for documentation archive, legacy root archive, reference files, logs, LASNAP16, and root residue artifacts
An execution handoff documenting exact routed slices, preserved exclusions, and explicit disposition for empty obsolete roots such as Database_Setup and Project Miner
validation_steps: Confirm packet 001f routes only the approved archive and residue roots and does not broaden into active surface cleanup
Confirm imported holdings are placed under archive homes with provenance-preserving structure and explicit archive-only treatment
Confirm empty roots such as Database_Setup and Project Miner are documented as obsolete/non-import surfaces rather than treated as active homes
Confirm Platform-Authority, staged runtime roots, and previously landed lineage tranches remain untouched
sql_permission_note: Packet 001f authorizes only bounded physical routing of approved archive and residue surfaces into archive homes plus documentation of empty obsolete roots. It does not authorize runtime changes, authority edits, schema promotion, or SQL execution.
